notes: ma1 ma3^R double recessive = PRR37 null + PhyB null.
ma1 ma6 double recessive = PRR37 null + GHD7 null. Both LD-repressors lost.

ma1 ma2 double recessive; ma2 encodes SET/MYND domain protein MA2_SMYD.
LD exposure in photoperiod-sensitive 100M WT; LD delays vs SD baseline.
BTx623/ATx623 ma1 (prr37-null) + SD shift; photoperiod insensitivity test. comparison_baseline=mutant (BTx623 LD vs BTx623 SD).
Continuous darkness removes Light and Photoperiod_LD sources; tests clock/photoperiod independence.
100M Ma3 WT under LD (~126 days); reference LD-delay phenotype. gene field misleads — no PhyB perturbation.
SbCN15/SbFT1 low-expression correlate under LD in photoperiod-sensitive 100M; encoded as FT1 knockdown under LD.
44M = ma2 ma3^R double recessive (not PRR37 as gene field suggests). Intermediate LD earliness.

sbid1 mutant + WT SbID1 transgene rescue; ID1 restored to WT (gm=1.0 vs mutant baseline=0.0).
